title: Being then experience — fish-tank theory + portent business ideas for mom
html:
Being then experience — fish-tank theory + portent business ideas for mom

Source: 2022-06-14 Apple Note. Sophomore-summer thought experiment combined with concrete TODOs and the first explicit "business to help my mom" list.

TL;DR

  • The fish-tank principle: "Fish will only grow to the size of its tank" — the environment-determines-ceiling thesis. Reappears in the Oct 2024 Cam Jipp note (need to leave the OSU groove to grow).
  • Carbon-consciousness duplication idea: "Duplicates of carbon consciousness is like umbrella academy duplication time travel dilemma of seeing your self, like back to the future" — one-line philosophical riff on AI-self-replication.
  • Be-then-experience principle: "Need to be intentional with what you are looking for; clear picture of friends and partners and businesses" — set the bar before you let in.
  • Mom-shopping list: headphones, recliner, hiking shoes, "get mom house by the riverll" — the first written instance of the mom house by the river aspiration, which becomes a recurring through-line.
  • "Portentous business to help my mom": NFT agency, Consultant, Drive through munchies dispensary combo, YouTube Shorts material — early business-ideation explicitly tied to mom's exit from labor.

Pattern observed

This is the first written form of mom-house-by-the-river — recurring through 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream ("Buy my mom a house"), Oct 2022 thoughts ("my mom will remain in this vicious financial cycle if I don't do something to break her out"), 2024 10 30 thoughts on my future ("I will buy my mom a relaxing life by a relaxing river"), and beyond. The lifelong motivation root is named here.

The fish-tank quote is also worth noting — same logic underlies the Austin move ("increase our surface area of luck") and the China chapter (need a bigger tank).

Open questions

  • "Drive through munchies dispensary combo" — predecessor to the 2022 09 13 drive thru weed / 2024 12 28 ideas list recurring weed-idea.
  • Did Yahir actually buy mom the headphones/recliner/hiking shoes?
